mnemonics: Make Incredible Users Run All Tasks
Many Insiders Create Excellent Rights Automatically
keyPoints: Create a user with a unique username and password.
Grant the user all privileges (SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE) on the database.
Use the GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES statement to assign all permissions.
Specify the user's database name and any additional roles or privileges as needed.
Verify the user's permissions using the SHOW GRANTS statement or MySQL workbench.
Test the user's privileges by performing various database operations.
